zh.lifeSummary: 當Jakob Kannengeter於1450年出生在德國梅可倫波-沃爾包莫沃爾包莫-格福斯瓦爾德格福斯瓦爾德時，他的父親Walter Kannengeter40歲，母親Gertrud Stevelin Jr.28歲。他和Margrethe von Tessin至少有1個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1528年在他的家鄉享年78歲。

nameMeanings.name: Jakob
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: spelling of   Jacob  , now also used in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Jacob
meanings: Biblical name, from Hebrew Yaakov. This was borne by perhaps the most important of all the patriarchs in the Book of Genesis. Jacob was the father of twelve sons, who gave their names to the twelve tribes of Israel. He was the son of Isaac and Rebecca and twin brother of Esau. According to the story in Genesis, he was the cunning younger twin, who persuaded his brother Esau to part with his right to his inheritance in exchange for a bowl of soup (‘a mess of pottage’). Later, he tricked his blind and dying father into blessing him in place of Esau. The derivation of the name has been much discussed. It is traditionally explained as being derived from Hebrew akev ‘heel’ and to have meant ‘heel grabber’, because when Jacob was born ‘his hand took hold of Esau's heel’ (Genesis 25:26). This is interpreted later in the Bible as ‘supplanter’ Esau himself remarks, ‘Is he not rightly named Jacob? for he has supplanted me these two times’ (Genesis 27:36). Jacob is especially common as a Jewish given name, although it also became very popular among the Puritans from the 16th century onwards, and has again been widely used since the 1990s. Compare James .

en.lifeSummary: When Jakob Kannengeter was born in 1450, in Greifswald, Vorpommern-Greifswald, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germany, his father, Walter Kannengeter, was 40 and his mother, Gertrud Stevelin Jr., was 28. He had at least 1 son and 4 daughters with Margrethe von Tessin. He died in 1528, in his hometown, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jakob Kannengeter est né en 1450, à Greifswald, Vorpommern-Greifswald, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Allemagne, son père, Walter Kannengeter, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Gertrud Stevelin Jr., avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles avec Margrethe von Tessin. Il est décédé en 1528, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jakob Kannengeter 1450 in Greifswald, Vorpommern-Greifswald, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Kannengeter 40 und seine Mutter Gertrud Stevelin Jr. 28. Er hatte mit Margrethe von Tessin mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1528 im Alter von 78 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jakob Kannengeter è nato il nel 1450 nel Greifswald, Vorpommern-Greifswald, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germania, il suo padre, Walter Kannengeter, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Gertrud Stevelin Jr., aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie con Margrethe von Tessin. Morì nel 1528, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jakob Kannengeterが1450年にドイツメックレンブルグ-ボルプオンメルンボルプオンメルン-グレイフスワルドグレイフスワルドで生まれた時，父Walter Kannengeterは40歳，母Gertrud Stevelin Jr.は28歳であった。彼はMargrethe von Tessinとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1528年に故郷で78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jakob Kannengeter(이)가 1450년 독일 클렌버그-보르폼머 보르폼머-그레이프스월드 그레이프스월드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Kannengeter(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Gertrud Stevelin Jr.(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Margrethe von Tessin(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1528년 그의 고향에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jakob Kannengeter nasceu em 1450, em Greifswald, Vorpommern-Greifswald, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemanha, seu pai, Walter Kannengeter, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Gertrud Stevelin Jr., tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas com Margrethe von Tessin. Ele faleceu em 1528, em sua cidade natal, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jakob Kannengeter родился в 1450 г. в местности грифсвалд, форпоммирн-грифсвалд, меккленбург-ворпоммирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Walter Kannengeter было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Gertrud Stevelin Jr., 28. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери от Margrethe von Tessin. Он умер в 1528 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jakob Kannengeter nació en 1450, en Greifswald, Vorpommern-Greifswald, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemania, su papá, Walter Kannengeter, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Gertrud Stevelin Jr., tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas con Margrethe von Tessin. Murió en 1528, en su pueblo, a la edad de 78 años.
